specific_location: Chatfield Reservoir, west side in middle of lake
description: An obvious Arctic/Pacific type loon by plumage, size and shape. Noticeable white patches on flanks extending above waterline no matter how low the bird was riding. Head shape was slightly blocked with "knot" above eye giving the head a shape more in line with COLO than PALO. Bill was held at an angle off horizontal. No vent strap was seen in the preening bird.Behaviors: Swam and dove continually. Occasionally preened allowing view of ventral surface.Call: nonePlumage: breeding
photographer: Photographer: Glenn Walbek, Glenn Walbek, Glenn Walbek, Glenn Walbek, Glenn Walbek
